blocks.text: Shelf Ready Packaging Manufacturer Vietnam

XinYuan manufactures shelf ready packaging (SRP) that makes retail simpler, faster, and more sustainable.Our factories in Vietnam and China produce high-strength corrugated and hybrid paperboard packaging for global brands in FMCG, food, beverage, and e-commerce sectors.Engineered for easy opening, quick shelf loading, and maximum visibility, every SRP unit saves time, cuts waste, and boosts sales at point of purchase.
Key Features:
• FSC® and ISO-certified production ensuring quality and traceability
FSC® and ISO-certified production ensuring quality and traceability
• Durable corrugated designs that support stacking and shipping
Durable corrugated designs that support stacking and shipping
• Easy-open perforations for efficient restocking and minimal handling
Easy-open perforations for efficient restocking and minimal handling
• Custom-printed branding for retail-ready presentation
Custom-printed branding for retail-ready presentation
• Fully recyclable kraft and white paperboard materials
Fully recyclable kraft and white paperboard materials
Shelf Ready Packaging that Delivers More

Shelf Ready Packaging (SRP) is more than just a box—it’s a complete retail solution designed to improve efficiency from warehouse to shelf.By ensuring quick replenishment, strong visibility, and low handling time, our SRP helps retailers reduce costs and improve the shopper experience.With designs tailored to retailer requirements and brand guidelines, XinYuan’s packaging enhances product impact and supply-chain performance alike.
Additional benefits include:
• Easy tear and clean opening for quick shelf setup
Easy tear and clean opening for quick shelf setup
• Clear branding and print consistency for fast recognition
Clear branding and print consistency for fast recognition
• Increased protection during transport and handling
Increased protection during transport and handling
• Improved sustainability through optimized paper usage
Improved sustainability through optimized paper usage
• Greater efficiency from warehouse to retail floor
Greater efficiency from warehouse to retail floor
Heavy-Duty Corrugated Packaging
Applications
Manufacturing Capabilities

Our corrugated packaging is built for strength, precision, and sustainability.We use B, E, and BC flute combinations to balance durability with lightweight efficiency.Each carton is performance-tested to ensure reliability across storage, transit, and retail display.
• B, E, and BC flute options
B, E, and BC flute options
• Flexo and offset hybrid printing
Flexo and offset hybrid printing
• Die-cut and shelf-ready display structures
Die-cut and shelf-ready display structures
• ISTA-certified compression and stacking tests
ISTA-certified compression and stacking tests
XinYuan’s shelf-ready packaging serves multiple retail and distribution needs.
• E-commerce mailers – safe, fast-assembly corrugated mail boxes
E-commerce mailers – safe, fast-assembly corrugated mail boxes
• Food & beverage trays – grease-resistant and printable designs
Food & beverage trays – grease-resistant and printable designs
• Retail display boxes – durable packaging for shelf presentation
Retail display boxes – durable packaging for shelf presentation

Our automated lines combine corrugation, die-cutting, and inline printing for high-volume efficiency.We use water-based flexographic inks and 100% recyclable kraft and white paperboards to meet sustainability goals for major retailers.
• Automated corrugation and die-cut lines
Automated corrugation and die-cut lines
• Flexo and offset hybrid printing capability
